body.title: Palace rule preferred_paths — initial seed of deprecated→preferred pairs
body.result: Seeded 7 palace nodes: theigors/rules/preferred_paths/* with 6 deprecated→preferred pairs (raw-psql, channel-direct-write, direct-db-write, print-statement, new-memory-type, feature-flag) plus parent index node
body.description:
New palace rule theigors/rules/preferred_paths — declarative list of (deprecated_path → preferred_path) pairs that Sonnet keeps falling back to. Seed list:
- raw psql (in code) → memory_get / memory_search MCP tools
- channel.py direct write → IMAP bus (when available)
- direct DB write → db_proxy
- print() → base-class logger (covered by inherit-base-class rule)
- new memory type → tag on existing type
- new feature flag (IGOR_*_ENABLED) → build to intent + go-live-when companion ticket

Shape: each entry is a child node with applies_when, deprecated, preferred, why fields. audit-precode reads this list; audit-smell catches violations post-write.

**Affected files:** new palace subtree theigors/rules/preferred_paths/*. No code.
**Design rules:** no persistence beyond palace.
**Test plan:** audit-precode flags a plan that proposes raw psql in code → AMEND with preferred suggestion. audit-smell catches a fresh diff that writes channel.py call when IMAP bus is available.
